query:
INSERT INTO variant_pricing (
  variantId, 
  factoryCostRmbExTax, 
  factoryCostRmbIncTax, 
  factoryCostUsdFob,
  myCostRmb,
  myCostUsd,
  fobFeeRmb,
  sellingPriceRmbIncTax,
  sellingPriceFobL1,
  sellingPriceFobL2,
  sellingPriceFobL3,
  createdBy,
  createdAt,
  updatedAt
)
VALUES
(120006, 380.00, 420.00, 55.00, 450.00, 62.00, 30.00, 580.00, 72.00, 68.00, 65.00, 1, NOW(), NOW()),
(120007, 385.00, 425.00, 56.00, 455.00, 63.00, 30.00, 590.00, 75.00, 71.00, 68.00, 1, NOW(), NOW()),
(120008, 320.00, 355.00, 48.00, 385.00, 53.00, 25.00, 480.00, 58.00, 55.00, 52.00, 1, NOW(), NOW()),
(120009, 395.00, 435.00, 58.00, 465.00, 64.00, 30.00, 600.00, 78.00, 74.00, 70.00, 1, NOW(), NOW());
